forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of fog on the eastern slopes in the early morning. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny morning. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 27.
Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
